what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG camera icon using stroked vector shapes with no fill and currentColor stroke inheritance.
observations: The SVG has a 24 24 viewBox and no explicit width or height.
It uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" with stroke width 1.5.
The camera body is a rounded rectangle from x=3 y=7 with width 18 height 13 and rx=2.
The top camera housing is drawn with a path from M8 7 to L9.5 4 H14.5 L16 7.
The lens is a circle centered at 12,13.5 with radius 3.5.
standouts: The icon is composed only from rect, path, and circle primitives.
Stroke styling uses round caps and joins.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions with a 24x24 viewBox, no fill, currentColor stroke, and rounded stroke joins.
Uses inline SVG attributes rather than CSS classes.
Keeps the icon definition compact on a single line.
notes: A compact outline camera glyph intended to inherit color from its rendering context.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename and path indicate a camera SVG icon, and the file contains a camera-shaped SVG icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to serve as a reusable camera icon that can adapt to surrounding text or UI color via currentColor.
contribution: Provides a themeable outline camera glyph with stable 24x24 geometry for icon usage in a fused design asset set.
summary_for_embedding: This is a compact 24x24 SVG outline camera icon built from a rounded body rectangle, top housing path, and circular lens using currentColor stroke styling.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing camera or photo-related actions as a reusable design-system icon asset.
